integrity.description: Agent used Garmin BaseCamp's export functionality

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Garmin BaseCamp on Windows, with realistic mouse movements, window focus, and typing.

The waypoints to be created are: Station-Alpha (Lat: 42.451, Lon: -71.102, Ele: 44.0, Depth: 3.5, Temp: 20.0), Station-Beta (Lat: 42.4535, Lon: -71.098, Ele: 44.0, Depth: 7.2, Temp: 18.5), and Station-Gamma (Lat: 42.456, Lon: -71.105, Ele: 44.0, Depth: 2.1, Temp: 21.3).
